summary: Iteration 27: Organ 3 Rebuild - Change Request System. All 15 backend tests passed. Full CR flow verified for both quotes and invoices. Frontend buyer timeline shows CR thread correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test documents created and cleaned up during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Organ 3 rebuild complete. CR system fully functional with: buyer_id field, state transition guards, resolve→Sent (not Draft), dashboard aggregation with client_name. Both quote and invoice CR flows have parity.

quote_cr_flow.details: buyer creates CR → doc becomes 'Change Requested' → CR has buyer_id → agent responds → status 'under_review' → agent resolves → doc reverts to 'Sent' (NOT Draft) → buyer sees full thread

invoice_cr_flow.details: Identical to quote flow - full parity verified

buyer_id_field.details: CR document has buyer_id resolved from entity's client relationship

state_guard_resolved.details: Responding to resolved CR returns error

state_guard_closed.details: Responding to closed CR returns error

state_guard_close_open.details: Closing an open CR returns error (must resolve first)

resolve_notification.details: Buyer receives notification when agent resolves CR (verified via buyer timeline)

dashboard_aggregation.details: /api/stats/agent returns change_requests with client_name enriched and type field

buyer_timeline_thread.details: ChangeRequestThread shows for resolved documents - buyer sees both buyer and agent messages

legacy_pdf_path.details: GET /api/documents/{id}/source-pdf works (returns 404 for docs without PDF)

test_execution_details.test_03_send_quote_to_buyer: PASSED - Quote status changed to Sent

test_execution_details.test_05_agent_responds_to_cr: PASSED - CR status changed to 'under_review', 2 messages in thread
test_execution_details.test_06_agent_resolves_cr_doc_reverts_to: PASSED - CRITICAL: Doc status is 'Sent' (not Draft)
test_execution_details.test_10_cannot_close_open_cr: PASSED - State guard working (must resolve first)
test_execution_details.test_11_buyer_sees_full_thread: PASSED - Buyer sees both buyer and agent messages
test_execution_details.test_13_invoice_cr_flow_parity: PASSED - Invoice CR flow identical to quote
